perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a black top and blue beret stands in front of a Costco refrigerator holding a large container of seafood fried rice; she smiles and speaks enthusiastically. (2) The scene shifts to a kitchen where the same woman receives the container from an off-screen hand; she then stir-fries the rice in a dark pan with a spatula. (3) She holds up a yellow tin of pepper salt and sprinkles it over the rice while tossing the pan. (4) The woman serves the rice on a light blue plate and sits down with another woman wearing a zebra-patterned bucket hat to eat and review the dish; they use spoons to eat, give thumbs up, and gesture excitedly while talking.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic background music begins. A female voice speaks with a high-pitched, excited tone, introducing the product. (2) Sound of a plastic container being opened is heard, followed by the rhythmic sizzling of rice in a hot pan. The music continues at a steady tempo. (3) The sound of a metal tin being shaken (pepper salt) is heard over the sizzling. (4) The sizzling fades out, and the music volume lowers slightly. Two female voices are heard in a conversational, enthusiastic dialogue. Clinking of spoons against plates occurs occasionally.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Hook: '超好吃?' (Super delicious?) and '超豪華 干貝海鮮炒飯' (Super luxurious Scallop Seafood Fried Rice) in large yellow and red fonts. (2) Functional Text: Price tag shown as '$389/KG'. (3) Decorative Hook: '好廚師阿頭' (Good Chef Ahead) appearing when the food is served. (4) Functional Text: Subtitles throughout the video translating the spoken dialogue into traditional Chinese. (5) Decorative Text: '粒粒分明' (Grains are distinct), '靈魂胡椒鹽' (Soul Pepper Salt), and '海鮮炒飯' (Seafood Fried Rice) appearing during the tasting phase.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Shopping Intro -> Home Preparation -> Cooking Process -> Tasting and Review

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 female friend sitting next to her, 1 female staff/passerby hand visible briefly.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman with long dark hair, wearing a black off-shoulder top and a blue KANGOL beret. Another woman with a zebra-print bucket hat and a white t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Starts in a brightly lit Costco warehouse with refrigerated shelves. Moves to a modern home kitchen with white tiled walls, a gas stove, and various cookware. Ends at a dining table with plush toys in the background.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a lifestyle and food review vlog intended to recommend a specific prepared food item (Seafood Fried Rice) from Costco. It uses a 'quick-cut' editing style to show the process from purchase to preparation to consumption, highlighting the ease of cooking and the quality of the ingredients (scallops and shrimp) to encourage viewers to purchase the product.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product review, showing the price, brand (Costco/Kirkland), and highly positive feedback from the creators.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-pitched enthusiastic narration, 'variety-show' style colorful text overlays, and close-up 'food-porn' shots of ingredients.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively targets a budget-conscious yet quality-seeking audience by showcasing a bulk 'wholesale' product as a gourmet meal through simple home preparation.
